description: Initial iOS platform capability to HarmonyOS NEXT adaptation reference. This is intentionally expandable; add capabilities as needed for the project being migrated.

permission.notes: Implement explicit permission/query flow and local notification publish API.

manifest.notes: Declare notification-related permission/configuration according to target HarmonyOS NEXT SDK.

implementation_notes: Separate permission state from publish API.
Preserve settings switch and request-permission entry.
Badge behavior may require platform-specific handling.
capabilities.fallback: Keep in-app badge and foreground alert if background/local notification delivery is unavailable.

permission.notes: Background execution policy differs; exact API depends on SDK and app type.

implementation_notes: Do not assume 15-minute background execution parity.
Keep foreground refresh as primary path.
Wrap scheduling behind adapter so product can degrade gracefully.
capabilities.fallback: Foreground refresh plus refresh-on-launch if background execution is not available.

permission.notes: Request location permission before using location-based features.

manifest.notes: Declare approximate/precise location permission as needed.

implementation_notes: Expose one-shot current location API.
Support manual location entry as fallback.
capabilities.fallback: Use manually entered location when location permission is denied.

permission.notes: TTS engine availability and voice selection differ.

manifest.notes: Add audio-related configuration only if required by selected Kit.

implementation_notes: Expose start/pause/resume/next/previous/stop state machine.
Keep current item index and item state in store to drive UI.
Do not bind UI directly to platform TTS object.
capabilities.fallback: Show textual briefing list if TTS engine is unavailable.

permission.notes: Network permission/config may still be needed.

implementation_notes: Preserve loading state and close/share actions.
Use a page-level wrapper so WebView lifecycle is isolated.
capabilities.fallback: Open original URL externally if embedded WebView is blocked.

harmony.api_area: atomic service card or widget form

permission.notes: Widget/card publish model differs from WidgetKit.

manifest.notes: May require card/form metadata and service extension declaration.

implementation_notes: Treat widget as separate deliverable from main app.
Start with one card size if full small/medium/large parity is costly.
Define cached data input contract for the card.
capabilities.fallback: Defer widget/card implementation while preserving shared cache service.

harmony.kit: Cloud Foundation / AppGallery Connect cloud storage equivalent
harmony.api_area: cloud key-value or account cloud sync

permission.notes: Requires product decision around Huawei account/cloud backend.

implementation_notes: Do not block local settings and saved data on cloud sync.
Keep CloudSyncAdapter interface but default to local no-op until backend is chosen.
capabilities.fallback: Local-only persistence with sync UI disabled or marked unavailable.

permission.notes: Sharing model depends on widget/card architecture.

implementation_notes: Expose cached data read-write API.
Do not leak iOS App Group terminology into app code.
capabilities.fallback: Use app-local preferences until card/widget support is implemented.

implementation_notes: Keep typed settings and data serialization.
Use explicit migration keys and default values.
capabilities.fallback: In-memory store for preview/testing.

permission.notes: Internet/network access permission may be required.

implementation_notes: Create shared HttpClient for all network requests.
Preserve timeout/error fallback behavior.
capabilities.fallback: Use fixed sample data when network fails.

harmony.kit: ArkTS XML parser or bundled parser

implementation_notes: Implement XML/RSS/Atom parsing as pure service utility.
Normalize date parsing and HTML stripping behavior.
capabilities.fallback: Skip malformed feed items and continue parsing.

harmony.kit: Text/NLP service or local heuristic implementation

permission.notes: Exact on-device NLP parity may not be available.

implementation_notes: Keep analysis APIs stable.
Start with heuristic or disabled analysis if no equivalent Kit is available.
Do not block feed display on analysis failure.
capabilities.fallback: Show content without analysis badges.

harmony.target_boundary: stores/* 和 pages/* 的状态管理

permission.notes: 纯框架层映射，不涉及系统权限。

implementation_notes: SwiftUI ObservableObject → ArkUI @ObservedV2 装饰 class
SwiftUI @Published → ArkUI @Trace 装饰需要追踪变化的属性
SwiftUI @StateObject → ArkUI @Local（组件内创建可观察对象）
SwiftUI @ObservedObject → ArkUI @Param（父组件向子组件传递可观察对象）
SwiftUI @EnvironmentObject → ArkUI @Provider + @Consumer（跨层级共享）
SwiftUI @State → ArkUI @Local（组件内部状态）
SwiftUI @Binding → ArkUI @Param + @Event（双向绑定拆为属性 + 回调）
SwiftUI @Environment → ArkUI @Provider/@Consumer 或 LocalStorage
所有 Store 类（如 SettingsStore 等）必须用 @ObservedV2 + @Trace，否则属性变化不会触发 UI 刷新
页面组件通过 @Local 或 @Param 持有 Store 引用，Store 属性变化自动触发 build() 重新渲染
这是架构级约束，不是可选优化。如果 Store 用普通 class，异步数据到达后 UI 永远不会更新。
capabilities.fallback: 无。这是 HarmonyOS ArkUI 的核心状态管理机制，必须使用。

implementation_notes: Expose shareUrl(url, title?) API.
Keep share button placement in detail pages and WebView.
capabilities.fallback: Copy URL to clipboard if share sheet is unavailable.

permission.notes: Local server behavior may require special permission or may not be suitable for mobile app store distribution.

manifest.notes: Depends on whether local API is retained.

implementation_notes: Confirm whether local loopback API is required in Harmony version.
If retained, isolate behind optional LocalApiAdapter.
capabilities.fallback: Disable local API and keep internal status service only.

implementation_notes: SwiftUI .refreshable → ArkUI Refresh 组件包裹 List 或 Scroll
Refresh 组件接收 refreshing 状态和 onRefresh 回调
必须在 screens.json interactions 中标记了 pull_to_refresh 的页面都实现
capabilities.fallback: 页面顶部放刷新按钮作为替代入口

implementation_notes: SwiftUI .searchable → ArkUI Search 组件
搜索结果中的文本高亮需要手动实现：将匹配关键词拆分为 Text span 并分别设置样式
iOS 的 AttributedString 高亮在 ArkUI 中需要用 ContainerSpan 或多个 Text 拼接
capabilities.fallback: 搜索无高亮，只显示结果列表

implementation_notes: SwiftUI .swipeActions → ArkUI ListItem 的 swipeAction 属性
支持 leading 和 trailing 方向
常用于删除、收藏、标记已读等操作
capabilities.fallback: 长按菜单替代

implementation_notes: SwiftUI .toolbar + ToolbarItem → ArkUI Navigation 的 toolbarConfiguration + @Builder
toolbar items 必须从 screens.json interactions 中搬运，不可省略
常见 item：刷新按钮、加载指示器、分享按钮、编辑按钮
capabilities.fallback: 将 toolbar 按钮放在页面顶部 Row 中

implementation_notes: .sheet → bindSheet（半模态）
.fullScreenCover → Navigation.push 全屏页面
.popover → CustomDialog 或 bindSheet
screens.json navigates_to 中 style 字段决定用哪种
capabilities.fallback: 用 Navigation.push 替代所有弹窗

implementation_notes: .onDisappear → aboutToDisappear（组件生命周期）
.onAppear → aboutToAppear
screens.json interactions 中 on_disappear 的 behavior 字段描述了具体行为，必须实现
常见 behavior：记录阅读时长、更新个性化权重、保存状态
capabilities.fallback: 在页面切换时手动触发

implementation_notes: SwiftUI ShareLink → HarmonyOS Share Kit 的系统分享面板
不能降级为仅复制到剪贴板
capabilities.fallback: 复制到剪贴板 + 提示

implementation_notes: Swift withTaskGroup(maxConcurrency=N) → Promise.all 分批执行
将任务数组按 N 个一组切片，每组 Promise.all，然后串联执行
functions.json concurrency_detail 中的并发数上限必须保留
禁止简化为串行 for 循环
capabilities.fallback: 无。并发是性能关键路径，不允许退化。

implementation_notes: Swift async let a = fetchA(); async let b = fetchB(); return await (a, b)
→ ArkTS const [a, b] = await Promise.all([fetchA(), fetchB()])
多个 async let 并发发起 → 合并为一个 Promise.all
capabilities.fallback: 无。

implementation_notes: iOS callback/completion handler → ArkTS Promise 封装
iOS delegate pattern → ArkTS 回调函数或事件回调
保持异步调用链的清晰度，不要嵌套回调
capabilities.fallback: 无。
